data.title: Broadstone Net Lease invests $61.4 million in three build-to-suit developments in VICTOR, N.Y.
data.description: A company based in Victor, New York, Broadstone Net Lease, has recently revealed plans for three new build-to-suit developments, with a total investment of $61.4 million. This announcement signals the company's continued growth and expansion in the real estate sector.

data.title: Equity Residential appoints Chris Carr (61) to Board of Trustees, increasing members to 11, with nine independent trustees.
data.description: Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) based in Chicago, has appointed Chris Carr to its Board of Trustees until the next annual shareholders meeting. With this addition, the Board will now have 11 members, with nine being independent. Mr. Carr, aged 61, meets the criteria of an independent trustee under the NYSE listing standards. He will be part of the Audit and Corporate Governance Committees.

data.title: Healthpeak Properties, Inc. reported Q2 2025 results: Net income $0.05/share, FFO $0.43/share, AFFO $0.44/share, total NOI growth 3.5%.
data.description: In Denver, Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC), a prominent healthcare real estate owner, operator, and developer, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. During the second quarter of 2025, the company reported net income amounting to $0.05 per share. Additionally, Nareit FFO reached $0.43 per share, FFO as Adjusted stood at $0.46 per share, AFFO recorded $0.44 per share, and there was a 3.5% growth in Total Merger-Combined Same-Store Cash (Adjusted) NOI. data.title: Douglas Elliman Inc. to hold Q2 2025 results conference call on August 1 at 8:00 a.m. (ET). Live webcast link provided.
data.description: Miami-based company Douglas Elliman Inc. (NYSE: DOUG) has scheduled a conference call and webcast to review its performance in the second quarter of 2025. The event will take place on Friday, August 1, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (ET). To participate, investors can access the live webcast at https://join.eventcastplus.com/eventcastplus/douglas-elliman-inc-second-quarter-2025-earnings-call. It is recommended to join at least 10 minutes before the scheduled start time. Following the call, a replay will be available from August 1 through August [end date not provided].

data.title: Ellington Financial to release Q2 2025 earnings on August 7, with conference call on August 8 at 11am, dial (800) 343-4136.
data.description: In Old Greenwich, Connecticut, Ellington Financial Inc. (NYSE: EFC) stated that it will report its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding June 30, 2025 post-market hours on Thursday, August 7, 2025. On Friday, August 8, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time, the Company will conduct a conference call to review these results. To join via telephone, please dial (800) 343-4136 at least 10 minutes before the designated commencement time and mention the conference.

data.title: AvalonBay releases 2024 corporate responsibility report, detailing achievements and sustainability goals.
data.description: Arlington-based AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) has recently unveiled its fourteenth Corporate Responsibility Report, showcasing its achievements and initiatives in environmental, social, and governance realms for the year 2024. The report demonstrates significant strides made towards the company's sustainability objectives. The document emphasizes the progress made in various areas, elucidating the company's vision for sustainable growth in the long run. This marks another milestone for AvalonBay Communities, Inc. as it continues to focus on its corporate responsibility endeavors.

data.title: JBG SMITH declares a $0.175 quarterly dividend per common share to be paid on Aug 21, 2025, to shareholders.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, JBG SMITH (JBGS), a prominent owner, operator, and developer of mixed-use properties in the Washington, DC area, recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.175 per common share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on August 21, 2025, to common shareholders recorded as of August 7, 2025. JBG SMITH focuses on owning, operating, and developing mixed-use properties primarily located in amenity-rich, Metro-served submarkets in and around Washington, DC.

data.title: James River appoints Joel Cavaness to Board of Directors and Compensation Committee. Cavaness is an independent, non-executive member.
data.description: Today in Pembroke, Bermuda, James River Group Holdings, Ltd. (NASDAQ: JRVR) disclosed the appointment of Joel Cavaness to its Board of Directors as an independent, non-executive member. This decision, effective immediately, also places Mr. Cavaness on the Board's Compensation and Human Capital Committee.

data.title: Black Hills Corp. in Kansas gets approval for rate hike, will recover $118 million in system investments.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Black Hills Corp. revealed that its Kansas natural gas utility branch had been granted approval by the Kansas Corporation Commission for revised rates. The settlement agreement, which received unanimous support, will enable the recovery of around $118 million in system investments made since the subsidiary's previous rate request in 2021. These adjustments also account for inflationary influences on the expenses linked to ensuring the provision of secure and dependable natural gas services.

data.title: NCS Multistage Holdings to release Q2 2025 earnings on Aug 1, discuss in 7:30 am CT call on Aug 1; Q2 2025 results disclosed.
data.description: NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc. will be conducting a conference call regarding its second quarter 2025 financial results on Friday, August 1, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). The Company, traded as NASDAQ: NCSM, plans to release its earnings report for the mentioned quarter on the evening before the scheduled conference call.

data.title: Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET) raises quarterly cash distribution to $0.33 per unit ($1.32 annually) for Q2 2025, up over 3% from Q2 2024.
data.description: Dallas-based Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET) has raised its quarterly cash distribution to $0.33 per Energy Transfer common unit ($1.32 annually) for the Q2 ending June 30, 2025. The distribution will be paid on August 19, 2025, to unitholders on record as of August 8, 2025. This marks a more than 3% increase from Q2 2024.

data.title: BeFra reports Q2 2025 results in Mexican Pesos, approved by the Board of Directors. CEO reflects on a challenging period.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE:BWMX) known as BeFra, revealed its financial results for Q2 2025. All figures are in Mexican Pesos (Ps.), approved by the Board of Directors, and comply with IFRS. The report may have slight discrepancies due to rounding. The President and CEO addressed a tough period with promising outcomes.

data.title: Grove Collaborative to report Q2 2025 financial results on August 7 at 5:00PM ET, 2:00PM PT.
data.description: San Francisco-based Grove Collaborative is scheduled to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 on Thursday, August 7th. The report will be made public at 5:00 PM Eastern Time and 2:00 PM Pacific Time.

data.title: Deckers Brands is nominating Patrick J. Grismer to its Board of Directors for a 2025 Annual Meeting. Dave Powers won't stand for reelection.
data.description: Deckers Brands, a prominent company in the design and distribution of footwear, apparel, and accessories, revealed the nomination of Patrick J. Grismer to its Board of Directors for election at the 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders scheduled for September 8, 2025. The current Board member Dave Powers will not seek reelection as part of this development. This strategic move underscores Deckers Brands’ commitment to maintaining a diverse and experienced leadership team to drive forward its innovative products and global market presence.

data.title: XRP outshines ETH with whale backing, but institutional interest in ETH may shift the tide in the market battle.
data.description: Over the last year, XRP has significantly outperformed ETH in terms of performance. However, the trend could potentially shift as there is an increasing demand from institutional investors for Ether. This shift in demand could impact the performance of both XRP and ETH in the coming months.

data.title: Hexcel (NYSE: HXL) declares $0.17 quarterly dividend on Aug 15, 2025, for shareholders of record on Aug 8, 2025.
data.description: Hexcel Corporation, listed on NYSE as HXL, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share on its common stock. This dividend will be paid to shareholders recorded as of August 8, 2025, with the payment scheduled for August 15, 2025. Hexcel is recognized for its expertise in advanced lightweight composites technology, playing a pivotal role in shaping the future of flight and transportation.
